scene_description: A road intersection with traffic lights and a white van driving away from the camera. There are trees and a blue sky with clouds in the background.
A tree-lined paved path with a grassy verge and a low wall on one side, with a person walking in the distance.
A multi-lane highway with cars driving on it, surrounded by trees and greenery on the left side, under a blue sky with some clouds.

A multi-story red brick building with white trim stands on a street corner. The street has multiple lanes and is divided by a median. There are trees and other buildings in the background. A few pedestrians are walking on the sidewalk. The sky is overcast.
A street scene with buildings on both sides, a clock tower in the distance, and several cars on the road.
A blurry view from behind a window showing a sidewalk, a metal fence, trees, and buildings across the street. A white door with a brick wall is on the right side.
A suburban road with a row of brick houses on one side and a grassy area with trees on the other. A white van and several cars are parked or driving along the road.

A street scene with a red brick road and a car driving away from the camera. The road is lined with houses and trees on both sides. A bus stop and a trash can are visible on the left side of the road. The sky is cloudy.
Blurry image with foliage and greenery in the foreground and background. A building is partially visible but indistinct due to the blurriness.

A suburban street with a sidewalk, a double yellow-lined road, and trees and bushes lining the sidewalk. A multi-story building is visible on the left. The road has a few cars and appears to be well-maintained.
A view from inside a vehicle showing a road tunnel with multiple lanes, brick walls on either side, and a bridge overpass in the background. Several cars are visible in the distance.
A street scene with houses on both sides, a road with cars driving on it, and a cloudy sky above.

A suburban street scene with a road stretching into the distance, lined with houses on the left and trees on the right. There are several vehicles on the road, including a white van and multiple cars. The sky is blue with many white clouds.

A multi-lane highway with a grassy verge and trees on the left side, and a guardrail on the right side. The road is wet and has white markings. There are several vehicles on the road, including a red car in the distance. The sky is blue with some clouds.

A multi-lane highway with a grassy area and trees on the left side and a guardrail on the right side. There are several vehicles on the road, including a blue van and a white car. The sky is blue with some clouds.

A street scene with a road running through the center, lined with buildings on both sides, some of which appear to be shops. There are several cars and vans on the road, and a few pedestrians are visible on the sidewalk. The sky is overcast.
A residential street with parked cars on both sides, lined with brick houses and trees, with a leafless tree on the left and hedges on the right.
A multi-lane highway with a bridge in the distance, surrounded by trees and streetlights, with a blue sky above.
A suburban street with two lanes of traffic, lined with residential buildings and trees, with vehicles traveling in both directions.
A road with a bridge overhead, a fenced area on the left, and trees in the background under a grey sky.

A suburban street with two-lane roads and sidewalks, lined with brick and white houses, trees, and greenery. A black car is in front, followed by a yellow car and other vehicles. Traffic lights are visible.
A paved path runs along a grassy area with trees and a body of water on one side under a cloudy sky. A cyclist and a person walking are visible on the path.
The image depicts a blurry view of dense greenery and trees along a street or road, with a blue sky and white clouds in the background.

A chain link fence in the foreground partially obscures a view of a brick building with a dark roof and white trim. The building appears to be a school or community center with a sign on the front. A paved area with a sidewalk and a small tree is visible.
A street scene showing a Kwik-Fit store with a gas station on the right, a dark grey car in the foreground, and a cloudy sky above.
A suburban street with trees and houses on both sides, a sidewalk on the left, and parked cars on the right.
A street scene with a metal fence separating two roads, a row of industrial buildings and warehouses in the background, and trees on the right side under a cloudy sky.
a close-up view of a red postbox with a white sign displaying collection times for Royal Mail

A street scene with a road curving to the left, lined with trees and bushes on the right side, and a sidewalk with a sign reading 'CROHAM MANOR ROAD'. The road has several cars parked along it and a crosswalk with white markings.

The image shows a blurry view of trees and greenery with patches of sky visible through the leaves. The scene appears to be a natural or park-like setting with dense foliage. No street or urban features are clearly visible.
A railway track runs along the bottom of the image, with a grassy area and trees on the opposite side. The sky is overcast and cloudy.
A road with a truck in the foreground, followed by two cars, on a cloudy day. The road has a bike lane and is lined with trees and houses.

The photograph shows a white two-story house with a brown tiled roof and red brick accents. A white SUV is parked on the street in front of the house. The house has a small front yard enclosed by a low brick wall and a wooden fence. There are trees and bushes on the left side of the image.

A two-lane road with a yellow line down the center, lined with brick houses on the right and a stone wall with trees on the left. A few cars are driving away from the camera, and there are power lines and a cloudy sky above.
A grassy area with trees and a curb in the foreground, a bridge and a building in the background.
a close-up of a red postbox with a white label on its front showing collection times
A road with a car driving on it, surrounded by dense greenery and trees on both sides, with a sidewalk to the left and a streetlight in the background.
A tree-lined road with dense greenery on both sides, a single vehicle in the distance.
A street scene with a road and sidewalk, featuring buildings, trees, and a gas station on the left side, with vehicles and a pedestrian area.
A straight road with two lanes and white markings stretches into the distance, flanked by dense greenery on both sides. The road appears to be surrounded by trees and bushes, with a cloudy sky above.

A road with a sidewalk on the right and a grassy area with a fence on the left. There are trees on both sides of the road. A person is walking on the sidewalk in the distance. The road has a sign indicating a school zone.
A suburban street with a multi-lane road, lined with trees on one side and buildings on the other, under a blue sky with white clouds.

The photograph shows a railway track with multiple lines, situated in front of a wooded area with bare trees and some greenery. In the background, there are buildings visible. The sky appears overcast.
A straight road with a single lane in each direction, lined with trees on both sides, a sidewalk on the right, and a low wall on the left. A car is visible in the distance.
A straight road with two lanes and a solid white line down the center, flanked by dense greenery on both sides, with trees forming a canopy overhead.

A street scene with a red brick building on the right and trees on the left. A wooden fence is visible on the left edge. The road appears to be in the distance. The image is taken from a low angle, looking up towards the sky.
A curved road with double white lines down the center, surrounded by dense trees and bushes on both sides, under a blue sky with white clouds.
A suburban street scene with trees lining both sides, a clear blue sky above, and a nearly empty road with a few streetlights.
A residential street with parked and moving vehicles, houses with gardens and fences on both sides, and trees and bushes lining the road.
The image shows a blurry view of a train on a track, with a road in the foreground and trees in the background. A blue sign is visible on the left side of the image.
A tree-lined path with a wooden fence on the right side and dense greenery on both sides, leading to a gate in the distance.
A paved path with bike lane markings stretches into the distance, flanked by grassy areas and dense greenery on both sides, with a cloudy sky overhead.
A residential street with parked cars on both sides, lined with trees and houses. The road is clear except for a few parked vehicles.
A suburban street with two rows of houses on either side, a brick wall and hedge on the left, and a white car on the right. The road has several cars and a bus driving away from the camera.

A suburban street with trees lining both sides, houses behind fences and gardens on the left, and a row of parked cars on the right. The road is tarmac with white markings. A grass verge separates the road from the pavement on the left.
A road with trees and bushes on both sides, a speed limit sign on the right, and a cloudy sky above.
A street scene with a bus stop on the right side, a curved road, and buildings and trees in the background.
a green field enclosed by a fence with trees in the background and a clear blue sky above

A winding path runs alongside a canal with grassy banks and trees. A wooden fence borders the path on one side. The path appears to be made of gravel or asphalt. There are buildings and a boat on the other side of the canal. The sky is cloudy with patches of blue.
A city street with buildings on both sides, a row of leafless trees along the right side, and a few cars parked on the right side of the road. A cyclist is riding on the sidewalk.
A multi-lane road with a concrete barrier on the left and a guardrail on the right, lined with trees and streetlights, with a cloudy sky above.
A street scene with a road, buildings on both sides, trees and hedges, streetlights, and vehicles.
A road with a single lane in each direction, lined with a green fence on the left and a hedge on the right, with a few cars and a truck visible.

The photograph shows a road with a grassy hill on one side, a fence on top of the hill, and a cloudy sky. The road is empty and has a guardrail along the side closest to the hill. There are trees and greenery on the right side of the hill.

The photograph shows a curved road in a residential area with a grassy verge and trees on one side and houses on the other. The road has a bike lane marked on it. There are several cars parked along the side of the road. A body of water is visible on the right side.
A street scene with a large brick building behind a row of green trees and bushes, a metal railing along the sidewalk, and a road in the foreground.
A multi-lane highway with cars driving on it, a guardrail on the left side, streetlights along the road, trees and a large building in the background under a blue sky with many clouds.

The photograph shows a street scene with a curved road under a bridge, multiple lanes, and a sidewalk. There are trees and buildings in the background, and a large white building on the right side. The road appears to be mostly empty with a few cars visible.

A residential street with parked cars on both sides, a few moving cars, and a cloudy sky. The road has double yellow lines down the center and a white line on the right side. There are houses and a signpost with directional signs.

A photograph taken from a vehicle on a multi-lane road with a metal barrier to the left and other vehicles in front. The road has white markings and there are trees and buildings in the background under a cloudy sky.

The image shows a street scene with a road under a bridge, a bike lane, and several buildings in the background. The road is divided with a concrete barrier on the left side and a bike lane on the right. There are a few vehicles on the road, including a white car and a blue van. In the background, there are several buildings, some of which appear to be under construction. Trees and greenery are visible along the right side of the road.
A residential street with parked cars, trees, and multi-story buildings on both sides, featuring a mix of brick and stone facades.

A canal scene with a blue and white vehicle in the foreground, a canal with still water in the middle, and trees and buildings on the opposite side. The vehicle appears to be on a path adjacent to the canal.
a large multi-story building with a modern facade featuring various colored panels and numerous windows, a grassy area with trees and bushes in front, and a road or walkway to the side
close-up of a red postbox with a white label showing collection times
A street scene with a road stretching into the distance, lined with trees, buildings, and parked cars on the right side. A sidewalk is visible on the left, with a few people and street furniture.

A metal fence runs along the side of a road, with a building visible behind it. The fence is made up of vertical bars and appears to be quite tall. In the background, there is a blue sky with white clouds.
a canal with a boat on the left side, trees lining the right side, and a clear blue sky above

A two-lane urban road with a pedestrian sidewalk on the left, lined with shops and restaurants including McDonald's. The road has a few vehicles, including a black SUV and a red car. Pedestrians are walking on the sidewalk.
A curved road with a grassy median and trees in the background under a cloudy sky.
A four-lane road with two lanes in each direction, lined with tall trees on both sides, and several vehicles traveling in the same direction as the camera.
A street scene with parked cars along the side of a road, a wooden fence separating the road from a grassy area with bare trees, and a cloudy sky above.

A bridge with green panels and yellow stripes spans over a canal, with a boat passing underneath. The canal is flanked by brick walls and buildings on one side and a blue graffiti-covered wall on the other. The sky above is overcast.
a suburban street with a dark gray car driving on the road, several parked cars, and a row of houses with brick walls and fences; the road has white markings and appears to be made of asphalt

A street scene with a four-way intersection, several cars driving or parked along the road, and buildings lining both sides. The road appears to be well-maintained with visible markings. There are leafless trees and some greenery present. The sky is blue with wispy clouds.
A residential street with parked cars on both sides, lined with trees and houses. The road has bike lanes marked on it.
A residential street with parked cars and buildings on both sides. The street is paved and has a sidewalk. There are several cars parked along the street, including a black van in the foreground.

A street scene with a row of trees and buildings on the left side, a road with several cars stopped at a traffic light in the middle, and a white van on the right side. The sky is blue with some clouds.

A street scene with a dark grey SUV on the right and two pedestrians walking on the sidewalk to the left. There are buildings on both sides, some with scaffolding and a white tarp. The road has white markings and fallen leaves scattered about.
A nighttime scene of a road with several vehicles stopped ahead, their lights illuminated. The road is flanked by trees and streetlights. The sky is dark blue with clouds.
A street scene with cars driving on a road flanked by residential buildings and trees, under a cloudy sky.
A paved path runs through a grassy area with trees in the background. The path is straight and empty. There are several trees and lampposts visible. The sky is cloudy.
